title: Sweet Plant Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry with a sweet touch. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: Plant
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers or broccoli

ingredients.name: Sweet
ingredients.notes: such as honey or agave nectar

ingredients.name: Crispy
ingredients.notes: such as chopped nuts or seeds

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the plant and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sweet and egg. Pour the mixture over the plant and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the crispy elements and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
